sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_sequence (dt DateTime, id Int32, event String) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY toYYYYMMDD(dt) ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_sequence SET event = 'Finish' WHERE event = 'End' AND id = 1;
SELECT id, sequenceNextNode('forward', 'head')(dt, event, event = 'Start', event = 'Continue', event = 'End') AS next_event FROM test_sequence GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, sequenceNextNode('backward', 'last_match')(dt, event, event = 'Stop', event = 'Continue') FROM test_sequence GROUP BY id;
